title: Fire Resistance - Vertical Walls
description: Warringtonfire regulatory information report (28928, Rev RIR4.6) assessing the fire resistance level of 51 mm, 64 mm and 78 mm thick vertically orientated Speedpanel wall systems to AS 1530.4:2014, covering base, head, corner, T-junction, angled and multi-angled connection details.

sections.name: Introduction
sections.description: Report scope, referenced assessment report 28928 R4.6, and sponsor details (Speedpanel Holdings Pty Ltd).

sections.name: Assessment approach
sections.description: Assessment methodology per the Passive Fire Protection Forum's fire-performance guidance framework.

sections.name: Compliance with the National Construction Code
sections.description: Evidence-of-suitability basis under NCC 2022 (Specification 1 and 2, Schedule 5).

sections.name: Declaration
sections.description: Sponsor declaration confirming no prior contradictory fire test evidence.

sections.name: Limitations of this assessment
sections.description: Conditions on load capacity, steel structure protection (vermiculite spray, 550 degC), and scope of use.

sections.name: System description
sections.description: Referenced fire test reports for the 51, 64 and 78 mm wall systems (Table 4).

sections.name: Referenced test data
sections.description: Test sponsors, dates and testing authorities for every referenced report (Table 5).

sections.name: Variations to the tested systems
sections.description: Wall height, head/base/side-edge/corner/T-junction/angled and multi-angled construction variations, plus sealant options.

sections.name: Purpose of the test
sections.description: Basis of AS 1530.4:2014 fire-resistance testing and prototype-equivalence assessment.

sections.name: Schedule of components
sections.description: Full component schedule (panels, tracks, fixings, sealants, protection linings) and construction figures for every connection detail (Figures 1-93).

sections.name: Conclusion
sections.description: FRL outcomes by wall thickness and connection type for vertical and inclined/curved systems (Tables 7 and 8).

sections.name: Validity
sections.description: Report validity period, review conditions and intended use.
